examples:
# 导入驱动模块
from buzzer import Buzzer
import time

# 初始化蜂鸣器（GPIO 6）
buzzer = Buzzer(pin=6)

# 自定义旋律示例:《两只老虎》片段
CUSTOM_MELODY = [
    ('C4', 400), ('D4', 400), ('E4', 400), ('C4', 400),
    ('C4', 400), ('D4', 400), ('E4', 400), ('C4', 400),
    ('E4', 400), ('F4', 400), ('G4', 800),
    ('E4', 400), ('F4', 400), ('G4', 800)
]

try:
    # 播放自定义旋律
    buzzer.play_melody(CUSTOM_MELODY)
    # 播放单个音符（A4，持续1秒）
    buzzer.play_tone(440, 1000)
finally:
    # 确保蜂鸣器停止发声
    buzzer.stop_tone()
